chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 551 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.371/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.372/2026 (Ex./A) 3. For orders on MA No.373/2026 (R/Surety) 26.01.2026 Applicant / surety Akbar Khan, present in person..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. This application has been filed by the applicant seeking return of surety documents. As per contents of the application, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it appears that accused Bazhan alias Badan was granted interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 03.07.2025, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/-, for which the applicant stood surety by depositing three original defence savings certificates amounting to Rs.10,000/- each. Thereafter, bail application was dismissed for non-prosecution by this Court vide order dated 07.08.2025. Subsequently, the accused has been acquitted by the learned trial Court, as is evident from the order dated 18.08.2025, annexed with this application. Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, learned Assistant Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety documents to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
